name: HARRIS Hotel & Conventions Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel bintang 4 premium yang memiliki akses pintu koneksi langsung ke dalam Summarecon Mall Bekasi, menawarkan kenyamanan belanja tanpa macet.
excerpt: A premium 4-star hotel featuring a direct indoor connecting door into Summarecon Mall Bekasi, offering traffic-free shopping convenience.

name: Hotel Santika Mega City Bekasi
excerpt_id: Penginapan ikonik yang unik karena dibangun tepat di atas rooftop lantai 5 Mega Bekasi Hypermall, diapit langsung oleh pintu Tol Bekasi Barat.
excerpt: An iconic hotel uniquely built right on the 5th-floor rooftop of Mega Bekasi Hypermall, directly flanked by the West Bekasi Toll gates.

name: Horison Ultima Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel bintang 4 legendaris di pusat kota yang menempel erat di samping Metropolitan Mall, menjadi tujuan favorit menginap para pejabat negara.
excerpt: A legendary 4-star city center hotel closely attached to Metropolitan Mall, serving as a favorite accommodation choice for government officials.

name: Aston Imperial Bekasi Hotel
excerpt_id: Hotel modern luks di samping Cyber Park yang terkenal dengan fasilitas kolam renang rooftop berpemandangan lanskap kota Bekasi 360 derajat.
excerpt: A luxurious modern hotel next to Cyber Park, famous for its scenic rooftop swimming pool offering a 360-degree view of Bekasi's cityscape.

name: Amaroossa Grande Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel boutique mewah berdesain interior megah serba emas yang terletak sangat strategis tepat di depan pintu keluar gerbang Tol Bekasi Barat.
excerpt: A luxury boutique hotel boasting a grand gold-themed interior design, strategically located right in front of the West Bekasi Toll exit.

name: Artotel Living World Grand Wisata
excerpt_id: Hotel estetik berkonsep seni modern kontemporer yang terintegrasi fisik di dalam area pusat perbelanjaan Living World Grand Wisata.
excerpt: An aesthetic, contemporary art-themed hotel physically integrated within the Living World Grand Wisata shopping center compound.

name: Hotel Santika Premiere Kota Harapan Indah
excerpt_id: Hotel resort megah berfasilitas olahraga terlengkap berskala olimpiade yang menjadi ikon akomodasi premium di koridor Bekasi Barat.
excerpt: A grand resort hotel boasting Olympic-scale sports facilities, serving as a premium accommodation icon along the West Bekasi corridor.

name: Swiss-Belinn Cibitung
excerpt_id: Akomodasi elegan yang terkoneksi dekat dengan pusat komersial Cibitung, menyediakan fasilitas kolam renang luar ruangan yang tenang.
excerpt: An elegant accommodation closely connected to Cibitung's commercial hub, providing serene outdoor swimming pool facilities.

name: Avenzel Hotel & Convention Cibubur
excerpt_id: Hotel mewah berfasilitas ballroom megah di jalur alternatif Transyogi yang ramah untuk urusan bisnis sekaligus liburan keluarga.
excerpt: A luxury hotel featuring a grand ballroom on the Transyogi alternative route, welcoming for both corporate business and family leisure.

name: Enso Hotel Kawasan MM2100
excerpt_id: Hotel bisnis minimalis modern yang terletak strategis di dalam kawasan industri, memangkas waktu tempuh para pelaku perjalanan bisnis.
excerpt: A modern minimalist business hotel strategically nested inside the industrial zone, cutting travel time for corporate travelers.

name: Grand Kamala Lagoon by Aparian
excerpt_id: Unit studio apartemen harian berkonsep modern minimalis yang menyatu dengan Lagoon Avenue Mall, dilengkapi fasilitas Netflix instan.
excerpt: Modern minimalist daily studio apartment units integrated with Lagoon Avenue Mall, fully equipped with instant Netflix access.

name: Grand Dhika City Timur by Travelio
excerpt_id: Apartemen harian urban yang ramah kantong di Bekasi Timur, terletak selangkah dari stasiun LRT untuk mobilitas tinggi tanpa macet.
excerpt: A pocket-friendly urban daily apartment in East Bekasi, located just steps away from the LRT station for traffic-free mobility.

name: Transpark Juanda Apartments by RedLiving
excerpt_id: Akomodasi vertikal modern bergaya pop di menara Jade yang terkoneksi dekat dengan stasiun KRL dan wahana permainan salju Trans Snow World.
excerpt: A pop-themed modern vertical accommodation in Jade Tower, closely linked to the KRL station and Trans Snow World indoor snow park.

name: Springlake Summarecon Guest House
excerpt_id: Sewa hunian vertikal harian berlatar pemandangan danau Summarecon yang asri, menawarkan suasana lingkungan yang rapi dan aman.
excerpt: Daily vertical housing rentals set against the lush Summarecon lake view, offering a neat, safe, and organized environmental atmosphere.

name: M-Gold Tower Residence Jaka Setia
excerpt_id: Apartemen eksklusif kelas atas berdesain elegan yang menyasar para pelancong solo premium dan pebisnis yang butuh privasi tinggi.
excerpt: An elegant, upscale exclusive apartment targeting premium solo travelers and businesspeople requiring high privacy standards.

name: Grand Galaxy City Apartment by 21 Room
excerpt_id: Penginapan kamar studio tematik estetis di dalam pusat kuliner Galaxy, menjadi pilihan favorit bermalam para kreator konten muda.
excerpt: An aesthetically themed studio room lodging inside the Galaxy culinary hub, serving as a favorite overnight choice for young content creators.

name: Kemang Pratama Guest House
excerpt_id: Rumah singgah berkonsep guest house homestay yang asri dan tenang di dalam kompleks perumahan elite, ramah untuk rombongan keluarga.
excerpt: A serene and shaded homestay guest house nested inside an elite housing complex, highly welcoming for large family groups.

name: Brams Property Kamala Lagoon
excerpt_id: Unit apartment harian kelolaan mandiri yang terkenal dengan hiasan interior estetik instagramable dan fasilitas dapur mini terlengkap.
excerpt: An independently managed daily apartment unit famous for its instagrammable interior decor and comprehensive kitchenette facilities.

name: Centerpoint Apartment Bekasi Barat
excerpt_id: Hunian vertikal legendaris di jantung kota dengan tarif sewa harian ekonomis yang dikelilingi ratusan pusat jajanan kuliner malam.
excerpt: A legendary vertical housing in the city heart with economical daily rates, surrounded by hundreds of late-night culinary stalls.

name: Aparthotel Grand Dhika City Jatimulya
excerpt_id: Konsep perpaduan hotel dan apartemen praktis di stasiun terminus LRT akhir, memberikan kenyamanan istirahat maksimal bagi komuter.
excerpt: A practical hybrid concept of a hotel and apartment at the LRT final terminus station, providing maximum rest comfort for commuters.

name: ibis Styles Bekasi Jatibening
excerpt_id: Hotel rantai internasional berdesain penuh warna (vibrant) yang lokasinya menempel dekat akses gerbang Tol Jatibening dan stasiun LRT.
excerpt: A vibrant-designed international chain hotel located closely attached to the Jatibening Toll gate access and the LRT station.

name: Fairfield by Marriott Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel bisnis premium berstandar internasional di pusat kota yang menyajikan kamar bergaya minimalis modern untuk ekspatriat asing.
excerpt: An international-standard premium business hotel in the city center, presenting modern minimalist rooms tailored for foreign expatriates.

name: Four Points by Sheraton Bekasi
excerpt_id: Destinasi menginap berkelas dunia dengan fasilitas pusat kebugaran modern lengkap dan restoran bernuansa fine-dining yang mewah.
excerpt: A world-class accommodation destination featuring complete modern fitness facilities and a luxurious fine-dining restaurant.

name: Merapi Merbabu Hotels & Resort Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel bintang 4 berkonsep budaya nusantara yang menyediakan ruang pertemuan akbar untuk keperluan seminar korporat dan kedutaan.
excerpt: A 4-star hotel rich in archipelago cultural concepts, providing grand convention halls tailored for corporate and embassy seminars.

name: Yusra Inn Hotel Bekasi
excerpt_id: Akomodasi transit modern ramah anggaran di sepanjang jalan koridor Pekayon yang menyediakan fasilitas ruang rapat modular yang taktis.
excerpt: A tactical budget-friendly modern transit accommodation along Pekayon avenue, providing functional modular meeting room facilities.

name: Monoloog Hotel Bekasi
excerpt_id: Hotel budget modern berkonsep minimalis efisien di dekat pusat kota, menawarkan kasur berkualitas tinggi untuk pelancong transit cepat.
excerpt: A modern budget hotel featuring an efficient minimalist concept near the city center, offering high-quality bedding for quick transit travelers.

category: Hotel esensial andalan para backpacker bisnis yang mengutamakan kecepatan proses check-in dan lokasi strategis di pinggir jalan raya utama.
name: An essential go-to hotel for business backpackers prioritizing rapid check-in processes and a strategic location on the main highway edge.
Versa Hotel Bekasi
excerpt_id: Penginapan modern minimalis yang letaknya sangat dekat dengan Terminal Bus Induk Bekasi, menjadi pilihan cerdas para pelaku perjalanan darat.
excerpt: A modern minimalist lodging located exceptionally close to the Bekasi Central Bus Terminal, making it a smart choice for overland travelers.
